primary_sources.title: Federal Constitution Article 113 (Functions of Election Commission)
Federal Constitution Article 114 (Constitution of Election Commission)

notes: Constitutional body, members appointed by YDPA on PM advice (Art. 114). Functions: voter registration, delimitation, conduct of elections. Delimitation cycle every ~10 years; recent cycles 2003, 2018 (Peninsula). Malapportionment file: 9:1 voter-weight ratio between largest and smallest seats (see malaysia-political-intelligence.md §1). Bersih and academic critique have repeatedly flagged independence concerns; legitimacy index reflects this.
